description: Verify deployed URL responds with HTTP 200 and is not an error page

checks.name: deploy-health
checks.label: Deploy Health Check
checks.description: HTTP GET deployed URL, verify 200 status and valid response body
checks.pass: curl deployed-url returns HTTP 200 AND body contains valid HTML (not error page)

failure.userMessage: Deployed URL did not respond with HTTP 200 or returned an error page. This may be due to DNS propagation delay (can take up to 5 minutes). Retry in a moment.
